title: Set Up Your Organization
description: Welcome to Qarote! Set up your organization, create your first workspace, and invite your team.
descriptionReturning: Create a new workspace to start monitoring your RabbitMQ servers.
cardDescriptionReturning: Create a new workspace to monitor your RabbitMQ servers.
workspaceNameHint: A workspace groups your RabbitMQ connections. You can create more workspaces later.
tagsPlaceholder: Add tags to organize your workspace
tagsHint: Tags help you tell environments apart — especially useful when managing multiple workspaces.
inviteDescription: Add team members now, or invite them later from Settings.
inviteRoleHint: Admins can manage members and settings. Members can view and monitor.
inviteEmailPlaceholder: Type an email and press Enter
successDescription: Your workspace is ready. Here's what you can do next:
